response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior/staff-level full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators), but the role is a Director-level IC Principal Engineer requiring ~15 years of experience and recognized AI expertise. The resume shows roughly 10-14 years of professional experience, no demonstrated AI products or platforms at scale, no advanced degree in an AI field, and limited cloud-platform strategy or executive-level technical leadership signals. The gap between a Senior/Staff IC profile and a Principal/Director AI strategy role is substantial.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, workshops, OSS founder of GISCollective
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products/platforms at scale
Lacks Principal/Director-level IC scope, strategy, or executive advisory experience
Cloud experience is limited (AWS CDK only); no deep cloud-platform strategy background

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs Principal/Director IC role
